analysis.reasoning: Core message: A celebratory congratulation on the 75th anniversary of Victory over Nazism in WWII, with hashtags including Victory Day, Russia, Soviet, and various commemorative tags. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West or its allies. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – Not addressed. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – Not indicated. RU4 (Russian history is admirable) – Yes; the tweet commemorates the Soviet/Russian role in the Victory over Nazism, aligning with glorification of Russian/Soviet historical contribution. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – Not relevant. RU6 (Russia interesting in culture/heritage) – Not the focus; it's commemoration, not culture/tourism. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU4.
